note: M07B implements + attended-verifies the 3 former attended_blocked surfaces (acrxproperty_opm, selection_monitor, palette_status_ui). The remaining residual is LIVE FIRING COUNTS of the persistent reactor / object overrule / selection-monitor, which require synthesized interactive editor events.

surfaces.name: selection_monitor
surfaces.evidence_ref: AriadneSelectionMonitor : AcEditorReactor pickfirstModified; registry op implemented:true; LIVE pickfirstModified FIRING attended-residual (needs interactive pick)

surfaces.name: palette_status_ui
surfaces.evidence_ref: AriadnePalette.cpp (arx-only TU; #ifndef ARIADNE_NATIVE_CRX); ARIADNE_PALETTE command -> MFC-FREE acedAlert status surface. A docked CAdUiPaletteSet is the deliberate MFC-dependent enhancement (would change the module runtime/linkage; deferred to avoid destabilizing the build).

live_firing_residual.reason: live firing counts require synthesized interactive editor events (command start, entity open, pickfirst pick) that the automated zero-COM pump harness does not generate; deferred to M07C / M08-with-live-partial-review. No fake PASS.
live_firing_residual.registration_and_headless_proof: all three are registered + their registry ops report implemented:true headless

palette_toolchain_note: MFC-free status skeleton shipped; docked CAdUiPaletteSet (MFC) deliberately deferred to keep the non-MFC ObjectARX build stable (packet: do not destabilize existing build)
